ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "public_id" INTEGER /* Public identifier for external tracking */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging used */,
  "pieces" INTEGER /* Number of pieces in the item */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the item */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the item */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the item */,
  "cube" REAL /* Cubic measurement of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the item */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source for the item data */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item's dimensions */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the item */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_packaging_type FOREIGN KEY ("packaging_type") REFERENCES packaging ("packaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_source_type FOREIGN KEY ("source_type") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packaging" (
  "packaging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packaging type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the packaging type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the packaging */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length the packaging can accommodate */,
  "max_width" REAL /* Maximum width the packaging can accommodate */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height the packaging can accommodate */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight the packaging can accommodate */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the packaging material */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the packaging */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the packaging's dimensions */,
  "default_package_type" TEXT /* Default package type for the packaging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packaging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., DENSITY STUDY, SUPPLIER, CUSTOMER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the item data */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system of the item data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the item data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being optimized */,
  "optimized_packaging_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packaging type suggested */,
  "optimized_pieces" INTEGER /* Number of pieces after optimization */,
  "optimized_cube" REAL /* Cubic measurement after optimization */,
  "optimized_weight" REAL /* Weight after optimization */,
  "efficiency_score" REAL /* Efficiency score of the optimization */,
  "optimization_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for optimization */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date when the optimization was performed */,
  "optimized_cost" REAL /* Optimized cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_optimization_optimized_packaging_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimized_packaging_id") REFERENCES packaging ("packaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_optimization_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_containers" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each container */,
  "container_type" TEXT /* Type of shipping container */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length of the container */,
  "max_width" REAL /* Maximum width of the container */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height of the container */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight the container can hold */,
  "current_weight" REAL /* Current weight of items in the container */,
  "current_volume" REAL /* Current volume of items in the container */,
  "container_size" TEXT /* Size of the container */,
  "container_material" TEXT /* Material of the container */,
  "max_stack_height" REAL /* Maximum stack height of the container */,
  "max_stack_weight" REAL /* Maximum stack weight of the container */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "container_id" INTEGER /* ID of the container used for the shipment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being shipped */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipment */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "shipment_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipment */,
  "shipment_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES shipping_containers ("container_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the item */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the data range for the report */,
  "data_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the data range for the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that has the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
